questions.assertion: Assertion (A): The Three Orders were a social hierarchy in medieval Europe.
questions.reason: Reason (R): They consisted of the clergy, the nobility, and the commoners.

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): The nobility played a significant role in medieval society.
